component.name: Sadhana
component.summary: A digital shrine and practice tracker

description.p: Sadhana is a cross-platform desktop application designed to support and enhance your daily spiritual practice. It provides a structured, customizable environment for working with traditional liturgies, mantras, and deity visualizations, while helping you track your progress over time.

ul.li: Pre-loaded modules for Chenrezig, Green Tara, Guru Rinpoche, and Manjushri
Four-stage practice structure: About, Opening, Main Practice, and Closing
Traditional Tibetan liturgy with phonetic and English translations
Beautiful deity imagery with fullscreen zoomable view
Create unlimited custom practice modules with any number of stages
Add custom liturgy text, mantras, images, audio, and PDFs per stage
Load liturgy from text files or edit directly in the application
Right-click modules to change grid images or delete
Lifetime and session-based mantra counters for consistent accumulation
Integrated journal with date-based entry browsing
Automatic logging of sessions with module, stage, and repetition counts
JSON data storage for easy backup and portability
Display of Tibetan lunar dates alongside Gregorian calendar
Highlighted special observance days (Düchen) with karmic multipliers
Pre-loaded with data from 2025 through 2049
Built-in audio player with play/pause, stop, and progress seeking
Volume control and optional repeat mode for continuous mantra playback
Support for MP3, WAV, FLAC, M4A, OGG, and other common formats
PDF viewer with zoom, fit-to-width, and multi-page display
Dark theme with gold accents designed for focused practice
Grid view for easy module selection with customizable images
Keyboard shortcuts for all major functions (navigation, fullscreen, zoom)
Integrated Reader with tabs for text files, PDFs, and plain-text editing
Resizable panels and scrollable text areas for extended liturgy

screenshot.caption: Main grid view with deity modules
Tibetan calendar with special observance days

ul.li: Four default deity modules: Chenrezig, Green Tara, Guru Rinpoche, and Manjushri
Complete Tibetan liturgy with phonetic and English translations
Custom module creation with unlimited stages
Mantra counter with lifetime and session tracking
Integrated practice journal
Tibetan Buddhist calendar with special observance days (2025-2049)
Audio player with repeat functionality
PDF viewer and text editor
Fullscreen image and text viewing
Dark theme interface with gold accents
Keyboard shortcuts for efficient navigation
Cross-platform support (Linux Flatpak, Windows, macOS)
